message: Just one street away from the office in Chinatown, this area is already called Little Italy.
Anna's house should be around here.
In front of me stands a woman claiming to be Anna Skakki's neighbor.
A scent of cheese and tomatoes drifts in from nowhere.
In contrast to the ever-busier Chinatown, Little Italy is becoming lonelier year by year.
Mulberry Street here is the most Italian-colored area in Little Italy.
I won't buy any more silly magazines.
Maybe I'll pick up something to kill time.
Thinking that even the last stronghold of Mulberry Street is succumbing to Chinese influence makes me feel a bit sad.
I notice newspapers and magazines written in Italian mixed in with the English ones. Just like Little Italy.
There's a magazine stand that seems embedded in the shop.
It looks like a bit cramped shop.
If I’m not careful, I might end up buying something.
Oh? There’s a magazine with Guy's name on the cover. I wonder what the article is about?
With so many varieties, I wonder if they can sell them all?
Newspapers and magazines are lined up tightly.
Starting with the New Yorker and Village Voice, there are gossip magazines and Italian publications.
And they even have books in Cantonese.
The magazine named BAM is famous as a third-rate publication packed with gossip.
In big Gothic letters on the cover,
it reads: 'The private life of popular Major Leaguer Guy'.
As I skim through the article, I find that,
Guy is in a hot love affair with Cindy, and his fiancée has unilaterally called off the engagement.
Honestly, where does that story even come from?
I ended up wasting money on such nonsense.
When the lady disappeared, the surroundings became lonely.
The pasta this person makes looks delicious.
I just thought this might be a detective's intuition.
When the lady disappeared, the surroundings became lonely.
To look rudely is quite disrespectful.
The lady in front of me is hardly what you'd call wealthy.
However, there’s no mistake that she’s full of vitality.
All around are just tourists and Italians.
There’s no one in speaking distance.
You, where are you from? Are you some sort of newspaper reporter?
A newspaper reporter? Do I really look like one?
Isn't that right? There seem to be quite a few recently.
No, I came here to see midwife Anna Skakki.
Oh dear, is that so? But,
I thought Anna had quit being a midwife.
By the way, it seems Ms. Skakki is out.
Ah, yes, that's right. She's out right now.
Do you know what time she might be back?
Oh no, isn’t it already this late?!
Without even looking back, they just left.
There's no one around to talk to.
You sure have a lot of free time, huh?
It’s not that I’m bored or anything.
Is that so? I told you Anna's not home, yet you’re still wandering around.
I don’t know what business you have with Anna, but I think waiting here is a waste of time.
What should I make for dinner tonight?
You might as well give up on getting Anna to take the kids. Who knows when she’ll be back.
Did she go on a trip or something?
Well, look at the time! Oh dear, this is a bother.
There's no one around to talk to.
Are you still looking to buy something? If not, then get going somewhere.
Do you still have business here?
Can I take a look at that book with the article about Guy?
If you want to read it, you'll need to pay up first.
Alright, I'll take one of those books.
That's more like it, thanks as always!
Here, Baked Apple Magazine, now known as BAM, costs $3.85 a copy.
Oh, so it spells BAM with the initials.
Don't block my work; standing there keeps customers away.
Not too bad. What are you going to buy?
I'd like to know about Anna Skakki.
What do you want to know about Anna?
Is she still active as a midwife?
Well, considering her age, she seems to have stopped delivering kids recently.
Did you come to get your child taken away?
Anna's family has three daughters, and while the two older ones are married off, the remaining youngest daughter is quite the troublesome one.
Yeah, she’s the only one who’s quite a bit younger and got spoiled while growing up.
Maybe that could be Meryl's daughter.
You should ask Anna directly about it.
Please tell me more about the youngest daughter.
That girl is, unusually for Anna's kids, really beautiful. But, whether that’s a curse or a blessing, she has a good personality, yet there are issues.
Oh dear, I said too much. Keeping this between us and Anna, okay?
Could you please tell me a bit more about the youngest daughter?
Sorry, but you’ll have to ask Anna for the rest. I can’t say anything more.
There’s nothing else I can tell you.
Do you know someone named Anna Skakki?
Anna Skakki? Is that your brother's girlfriend?
No, that's not it. I'm a local resident around here.
I'm not from around here, so I really don't know.
Nah, I'm sorry I can't be of help.
No matter how many times you ask, I don't know.
Well, I can say this since I'm not a resident here, but you know,
isn't it going to get swallowed up by Chinatown?
It's not at all an exaggeration. In fact, there are Cantonese magazines lined up here, right? They sell.
Eventually, all of America might just turn into Chinatown.
One day, the entire planet might end up being just Chinese people.
It's not an interesting story, but lately, dismemberment cases have been all the rage.
Don't you know? Look, it's about that serial murder case.
I really hate these violent incidents. They just bring me down.
What kind of case was it again?
Well, it all started on the West Coast, and recently they found victims in Detroit.
Apparently, parts of women's bodies have been taken away. It's a nasty case.
I wonder what kind of guy the murderer is.
I think that murderer is totally cool.
Well, even if the killing method is whacked out, leaving no clues means he's sharp, right?
You aren't the murderer, are you? Hahaha.
I want to know more about that case.
If you want to know that badly, you should buy a magazine or a newspaper and look it up yourself. I'm not an information broker.
Meryl's search for her daughter depends on the information about Anna Skakki.
There's a possibility it could end with just her story, even before testing reasoning skills.
Still, I wonder why Meryl wants to look for her daughter right now.
Anna's address is in an apartment room up ahead, but is she still living there?
So, does that mean coming here was a waste of time?
Hey you, do you have business with our neighbor?
Who do you think you are? You don't look Italian.
Unfortunately, I don't have Italian blood mixed in, but perhaps
Right now, I should probably talk to the woman in front of me.
I understood Anna was out, but I’d be happier with a bit more information.
Where did the rumor come from that Guy and Kristy called off their engagement?
It seems like an obvious lie, but I bet some people will believe it.
The serial murder case that the vendor mentioned is probably the same incident that came up at the party.
The perpetrator who slices up women's bodies and takes parts away.
What are they doing with those taken parts?
I can't tell if the perpetrator is acting systematically, but it's clear they're a person with dreadful insanity.
No way, she's not back yet.
I visited a room in a building facing Mulberry Street, Anna Skakki's house.
However, Anna seems to be absent; there was no response to the doorbell or knock.
With newfound hope, I knocked again, but Anna still seems to be
I visited Anna's house, but again she seems to be gone. When will she
